title: Get Started | InstantMed
headings: A few questions about your experience
bodyText: You're back online Skip to main content How it's affecting you Step 2 of 7 A few questions about your experience One question at a time. There are no wrong answers. Question 1 of 5 0/5 answered How confident are you that you can get and keep an erection? 1 2 3 4 5 Not at all Very confident These questions are from the IIEF-5, a clinically validated assessment used by doctors in over 30 countries.(Rosen et al., J Urology, 1999) Continue
